title: LLM Avalanche Bilbao (Spain)
description: LLM Avalanche Bilbao is colocated with OSS Summit EU, the main Linux Foundation conference in Europe. We gather all those interested in Generative AI and charting a course for it in Linux Foundation and beyond, to build OSS AI. If you are in Europe, hop to Bilbao and join us! You do not have to have a pass to the OSS Summit itself. The topics will be technical and include models, applications, benchmarks, community validation mechanisms, and more. The format is an unconference. You have to [register at Eventbrite](https://www.eventbrite.com/e/llm-avalanche-bilbao-tickets-718378087197) to attend. (The Bay we're speaking here is the Bay of Biscay.)
